name: Taffy Apple Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg fat free cream cheese, softened
1/2 cup water mixed with lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Remove 2/3 cup of cookie dough and reserve for another use.
3. Flour the Dough and Pizza Roller, then roll the dough into a 14-inch circle on the 15-inch Baking Stone.
4. Bake for 11-14 minutes or until the cookie is lightly browned. Let cool for 10 minutes, then loosen the cookie from the Baking Stone with a serrated bread knife. Allow to cool completely.
5. In a bowl, blend the peanut butter, cream cheese, brown sugar, and vanilla extract until smooth.
6. Spread the mixture evenly on the cooled cookie.
7. Peel, core, and slice apples using an Apple Peeler/Corer/Slicer.
8. Dip apple slices in the water mixture to prevent browning.
9. Arrange the apple slices on top of the cream cheese mixture.
10. Sprinkle lightly with cinnamon.
11. Drizzle caramel topping over the apples using a V-Shaped Cutter.
12. Cut into pieces and serve.
